name: Mazaya Real Estate Development Q.P.S.C.
summary: Mazaya Real Estate Development Q.P.S.C. engages in the real estate investment and development businesses. It develops real estate properties, such as master developments to individual projects in the residential, commercial, and industrial sectors. The company also provides project management and consultancy, property valuation, strategic partnership, real estate brokerage, master developments, assets and facility management division, marketing management and consultancy, real estate portfolio and fund management, and real estate market research services, as well as real estate management and maintenance services. In addition, it trades in mechanical electrical and construction equipment. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Doha, Qatar.
